description_long: This convenience store is a single-story, rectangular building with a flat roof and a prominent blue overhang above the main entrance. The front facade features a long expanse of floor-to-ceiling glass windows, providing visibility into the store and allowing natural light to flood the interior. The entrance is centrally located on the curved corner, marked by a green sign above the glass double doors. The side and rear walls are solid, with a few service doors and loading bays visible, painted in blue to match the roof. The building sits on a paved surface, likely intended for pedestrian access and parking. The overall design is functional and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story convenience store with a flat blue roof, large glass front windows, and a curved corner entrance marked by a green sign.
description_view_0: The front and left side are visible, showing the long glass storefront, main entrance with green signage, and blue service doors on the left.
description_view_1: The curved glass entrance and green sign are prominent, with the blue roof and paved entry area clearly visible.
description_view_2: The right side and rear are shown, highlighting the extended glass windows and blue service doors, with minimal detail on the back wall.
description_view_3: The rear of the building is visible, showing two blue-roofed sections and no windows, emphasizing the service and loading area.
attribute_storefront_signage: A single green rectangular sign is mounted above the main entrance, with no visible text or logo. The sign is centered and unlit, blending with the modern facade.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Yes, there are double glass entrance doors at the curved corner, framed in metal with high transparency. No visible handles or hardware details are apparent.
attribute_display_windows: A continuous band of large, floor-to-ceiling glass display windows spans the front and wraps around the curved corner, framed in metal. No advertisements or displays are visible.
